caption: A person with short brown hair, wearing a dark blue t-shirt and glasses, is visible in a small overlay window against a background with a Christmas tree, showing an excited facial expression that transitions into a wide-mouthed laugh. This person is watching a game of "MADDEN NFL 23" played on a football field with red and yellow end zone markings and a crowd in the background. The screen displays "WORLD CHAMPIONS 1937 1942" along the wall and shows a scoreboard with "12" and "7" as scores, "2nd" for the quarter, and "0:10" remaining on the clock. A football player in a white jersey with the number "1" and white pants is seen kneeling on the grass. Another player in a black uniform stands nearby. As the sequence progresses, the player in white shifts his posture while kneeling, and the person in the overlay window continues to react with excitement.
